_comment: Decision ledger for the ACTIVE line. Each Friday the daily routine appends one rebalance with target weights (ticker -> fraction; the remainder is held as cash). Self-financing: no new money in/out. Weights are applied at that date's close and held until the next entry. Never edit past entries. See CLAUDE.md.

rebalances.label: Inception
rebalances.rationale: Start equal-weight: 1/15 in every name. Identical to the buy & hold book on day one.

rebalances.label: Trim the parabola, fund the laggards
rebalances.rationale: Six months in, the memory/storage trade has gone vertical: Seagate (+224%), Marvell (+213%), Micron (+211%) and SK Hynix (+203%) have each roughly tripled YTD and now carry far more weight — and risk — than I want in four correlated DRAM/HBM names. I'm trimming all four to ~4.5% and recycling the proceeds into quality laggards that haven't run: Broadcom (+10%), Arista (+22%), TSMC (+33%) and Equinix (+40%), plus a contrarian add to the only loser in the book, Constellation Energy (-31%). I'm also parking ~3.5% in cash as dry powder after a move this parabolic. Conviction tilt, not a wholesale reshuffle — all 15 names stay in.
